body:
Excalibur support for Guard Villagers
Credits:

almightytallestred for creating the mod Guard Villages

Maffhew for creating Excalibur resource pack

For now, this support is avalabile for 1.20.0 and 1.20.1 versions of Minecraft, but it will avalabile for rest of the versions soon.
